message:
✨ Player overlay with 4-col layout, stream badges, failover preview (#70)

- Restructure player overlay into 4 columns: channel+group, programme+time,
  description, stream badges+provider+clock
- Extract StreamInfoBadges as shared widget from channels_screen
- Move resolution/codec badges from bottom control bar to top overlay
- Add provider badge (purple) and clock to overlay
- Programme times now use 12hr format instead of 24hr
- Failover rows are tappable to preview alternative streams
- Auto-restore original channel when debug dialog closes
- Persist accepted failover decisions (green checks) across sessions
- Accept/reject properly clean up the opposite list
- Fix app icon: transparent corners outside rounded rect
- Fix rename dialog to show tvgName as original name
- Deeper gradient on overlay for better contrast

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
